hero.title: Real Value, Real Security.
hero.description: VaultWise is the only platform that protects even your digital assets in insured, physical vaults. Meet the future standard of savings.

features.title: The Future of Savings. Today.
features.description: Our platform combines top-tier security with modern financial tools, giving you full control and peace of mind over your assets.

security.title: Physical Security
security.description: All your digital and precious metal assets are physically protected in insured and audited high-security vaults.

ai.title: AI-Powered Portfolio
ai.description: Our smart algorithms analyze market data to offer you personalized savings strategies and investment opportunities.

instant.title: Instant Trading
instant.description: Buy, sell, or convert your assets 24/7. Always stay one step ahead of the market.

logoutSuccess.title: Logged Out
logoutSuccess.description: You have been successfully logged out.

logoutError.title: Logout Failed
logoutError.description: An error occurred during logout. Please try again.

buyDialog.title: Buy Asset
buyDialog.description: Select an asset and enter the amount you want to buy.
buyDialog.toastInvalidDescription: Please select an asset and enter a valid amount.
buyDialog.toastInsufficientDescription: Your available balance of {balance} TL is not enough for this transaction.

confirm.title: Confirm Purchase
confirm.description: Please review and confirm your purchase.

sellDialog.title: Sell Asset
sellDialog.description: Select an asset and enter the amount you want to sell.
sellDialog.assetPlaceholder: Select an asset from your portfolio
sellDialog.toastInvalidDescription: Please select an asset and enter a valid amount.
sellDialog.toastInsufficientDescription: You do not have enough {symbol} to sell. Your balance is {amount}.
sellDialog.toastSuccessDescription: You have successfully sold {amount} {symbol} for approximately {tl} TL.

confirm.title: Confirm Sale
confirm.descriptionSell: Please review and confirm your sale.

autoSaveDialog.title: AI-Powered Auto-Save
autoSaveDialog.createDescription: Let our AI assistant create a personalized savings plan for you. Just answer a few questions.
autoSaveDialog.suggestionDescription: Here's a personalized savings plan based on your goals and preferences.
autoSaveDialog.goalLabel: What is your primary financial goal?
autoSaveDialog.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Save for a car, retirement, vacation
autoSaveDialog.riskLow: Low - I prefer safe, steady growth.
autoSaveDialog.riskMedium: Medium - I'm comfortable with some risk for better returns.
autoSaveDialog.riskHigh: High - I'm willing to take significant risks for high rewards.
autoSaveDialog.assetsLabel: Which assets are you interested in?
autoSaveDialog.suggestionCardDescription: We suggest automatically saving {amount} TL towards {asset} every month.
autoSaveDialog.toastErrorDescription: Could not generate a suggestion. Please try again later.
autoSaveDialog.toastSuccessDescription: Your new auto-save plan for {asset} is now active.

portfolioChart.title: Portfolio Performance
portfolioChart.noData: Not enough data to display chart.

recentTransactions.title: Recent Transactions
recentTransactions.description: Your latest buy and sell activities.

aiMarketAnalysis.title: AI Market Analysis
aiMarketAnalysis.description: Get an AI-powered summary of the current market situation.
aiMarketAnalysis.noData: Not enough market data to generate analysis.
aiMarketAnalysis.generationFailed: Analysis generation failed. Please try again.
aiMarketAnalysis.dataSourceError: Price data source is currently unavailable.

autoSavePlans.title: Active Auto-Save Plans
autoSavePlans.noPlans: You have no active auto-save plans. Create one with our AI assistant!

toast.title: Plan Deactivated
toast.description: The auto-save plan has been stopped.

assetList.title: Your Assets
assetList.description: Detailed view of all assets in your portfolio.

loginPage.title: Login to Your Account
loginPage.description: Enter your email below to login to your account.

success.title: Login Successful
success.description: Welcome back! Redirecting you to the dashboard.

error.title: Login Failed
error.invalidCredentials: The email or password you entered is incorrect.
error.default: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

signupPage.title: Create an Account
signupPage.description: Enter your email and password to create an account.

success.title: Account Created
success.description: Welcome! We're redirecting you to your new dashboard.

error.title: Signup Failed
error.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
error.emailInUse: This email address is already in use.
error.default: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot Password
forgotPasswordPage.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

success.title: Email Sent
success.description: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link has been sent.

error.title: Error
error.userNotFound: No account found with this email address.
error.default: An error occurred. Please try again.

success.title: Profile Updated
success.description: Your changes have been saved successfully.

error.title: Update Failed
error.description: Could not update your profile. Please try again.

account.title: Password
account.description: Update your password here. It's a good practice to use a strong, unique password.

feedback.title: Submit Feedback
feedback.description: Have an idea or found a bug? Let us know!
feedback.placeholder: Your feedback is valuable to us...

success.title: Feedback Received!
success.description: Thank you for helping us improve.

error.title: Submission Failed
error.tooShort: Feedback must be at least 10 characters.
error.general: An error occurred. Please try again.

iban.title: Bank Accounts (IBAN)
iban.description: Manage your saved bank accounts for deposits and withdrawals.

deleteConfirm.title: Are you sure?
deleteConfirm.description: This will permanently delete the IBAN ending in {iban}. This action cannot be undone.

success.addDescription: The new bank account has been saved.
success.deleteDescription: The bank account has been removed.

error.title: Error
error.emptyFields: Account holder and IBAN cannot be empty.

saveSuccess.title: Settings Saved
saveSuccess.description: Your new settings have been applied.

depositPage.title: Deposit
depositPage.description: Add funds to your VaultWise account.
depositPage.cardDescription: Select an amount and the account you will send from.
depositPage.noIban: No IBAN found. Please add a bank account in

identityWarning.title: Important Information
identityWarning.description: You can only deposit funds from bank accounts registered under your own name.

success.title: Deposit Request Created
success.description: Please transfer {amount} TL to the provided IBAN to complete your deposit.

error.title: Error
error.invalidInput: Please select an IBAN and enter a valid amount.

withdrawPage.title: Withdraw
withdrawPage.description: Withdraw funds from your VaultWise account to your bank account.
withdrawPage.cardDescription: Select the amount and the destination IBAN.
withdrawPage.noIban: No IBAN found. Please add a bank account in

fastInfo.title: FAST Transfer
fastInfo.description: Withdrawals are processed 24/7 via FAST to supported banks.

info.title: Withdrawal Information
info.personalAccount: You can only withdraw to bank accounts registered under your own name.
info.supportedBanks: Transfers to Akbank, Denizbank, Fibabanka, Garanti BBVA, QNB Finansbank, İş Bankası, Vakıfbank, and Ziraat Bankası are processed 24/7.
info.otherBanks: Transfers to other banks are processed during EFT hours on weekdays.

success.title: Withdrawal Initiated
success.description: {amount} TL will be transferred to your account shortly.

error.title: Withdrawal Failed
error.invalidInput: Please select an IBAN and enter a valid amount.
error.limit24h: The amount exceeds your remaining 24-hour withdrawal limit.
error.limit30d: The amount exceeds your remaining 30-day withdrawal limit.
